title: The Nights
why_this_song: The Nights by Avicii (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 8 times; first heard in: "One day, my father, he told me, "Son, don't let it slip away""
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "One day, my father, he told me, "Son, don't let it slip away""
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Made memories we knew would never fade"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: ""When you get older your wild heart will live for younger days"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Once upon a younger year"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: The animals inside came out to play
Went face to face with all our fears

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "father" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "father" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "told" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "told" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: So live a life you will remember"
Don't forsake this life of yours

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Think of me if ever you're afraid"

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "The Nights", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "The Nights", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "The Nights" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "The Nights" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "The Nights" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "The Nights", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
